title: The Masked Intruders
description: Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Chopper, Rob Lucci, Kaku. Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: He's jumping around in Midair again!!

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: You should've run into our carpenters...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: I have no recollection of meeting one...

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: We never said anything about that...

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: In any case, just hand over...

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Since you now know too much.

summary: Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.
